name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Canned -  Salmon & Trout in Loaf Pate 400g
description: Reflex Plus Salmon & Trout Adult Cat Canned Food , fully-balanced, fish protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 9.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) -?0.5 Moisture (%) -?80 Crude Ash (%) - 3.0 Vitamin A (Min) - 1650 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 240 IE/kg Iron - 9.6 mg/kg Copper - 1.4 mg/kg Manganese - 1.8 mg/kg Iodine - 0.75 mg/kg Zinc - 9.5 mg/kg Selenium - 0.025 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and Animal Derivatives, Fish and Fish derivatives (Salmon 4%, Trout 4%), Cereals, Minerals, Vegetal Protein Extracts, Cassia Gum (2200 mg/kg), Preservers and Colourants. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day, where 1 can serves 2 meals. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
